notes.author: codex
notes.text:
2026-05-29 package-governance/readiness audit evidence.

Required package commands run from repo root: `npm run check`, `npm test`, `npm run pack:dry-run`, and `npm run changelog:check` all exited 0. Logs: `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-npm.log`; summary: `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-npm-summary.tsv`.

Temporary pm CLI flow in `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-flows/pm-ts-starter-cli`: `pm init`, `pm install /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-ts-starter --project`, `pm hello --name "Release Auditor" --loud`, `pm ts-starter info`, `pm create Task ...`, `pm close <id> ...`, `pm ts-starter-demo import --source realistic-audit --file ./missing-demo.json`, `pm search "Exercise" --json`, `pm list-closed --json`, and `pm package doctor --detail deep --trace` all exited 0. Real workspace item id used for hook/search/list flow: `pm-m34k`.

Observed capability behavior: commands execute and return expected payloads; importer command is exposed as `pm ts-starter-demo import` and runs; preflight and `output_format` service logs appear on real pm commands; doctor reports command paths `hello`, `ts-starter info`, and `ts-starter-demo import`, plus hook/importer/search/service/renderer registrations.

Lifecycle hook caveat: direct SDK harness invocation of registered `afterCreate`/`afterClose` callbacks logs expected hook messages, but real `pm create`/`pm close` did not emit the ts-starter hook messages even though preflight/service logs appeared. This suggests either runtime hook dispatch is not firing for these events or hook output is not surfaced in the real CLI path.

Renderer/search direct harness: default export activation registers renderer `json`, search provider `ts-starter-prefix`, schema `ts-starter-title-length`, one preflight, and `output_format` service. Direct renderer sample for `json` is TSV. CLI `--json` remained valid JSON in the observed list/search commands. README says renderer `ts-starter-compact`, while code registers `json`; document or implementation naming should be reconciled before using this as a reference.

Governance: GitHub repo `unbraind/pm-ts-starter` is PUBLIC, unarchived, default branch `main`, latest release `v2026.05.28` published 2026-05-28T23:30:02Z. npm package `pm-ts-starter` latest is `2026.5.28`, repository points at `github.com/unbraind/pm-ts-starter`.

Secret/private-data scan: tracked files and git history were scanned with path-only output for private-key headers, common cloud/GitHub/npm/OpenAI/Slack/Stripe/SendGrid token shapes, generic secret assignments, email literals, and local private host markers. No matches were found. Scan summary: `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-secret-scan.tsv` (empty/no matches).

Write hygiene: no source, package metadata, workflows, or docs were intentionally changed. An npm-driven run dirtied package metadata during verification; it was restored to HEAD. Final remaining changes are limited to `.agents/pm` tracker files.

metadata.title: Release readiness hardening for pm-ts-starter
metadata.description: Prepare pm-ts-starter as a production-ready pm package with package-local pm tracking, generated changelog data, CI and daily release automation.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.acceptance_criteria: Package installs with pm install; npm release gate passes; changelog is generated from package-local pm data; tracked files and reachable git history have no secret pattern hits.

metadata.title: ci: fix release workflow step ordering
metadata.description: Swap changelog regeneration before release:check so changelog:check sees the version-bumped CHANGELOG.md instead of failing the gate.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Swapped changelog generation before release checks so changelog:check sees updated file. Verified workflow dispatch then triggers npm publish + GH release.

metadata.title: Add publish retry + provenance fallback to release workflow
metadata.description: Replace the npm publish step in .github/workflows/release.yml with a resilient version that (1) skips if the version is already published, (2) retries up to 3 times with 30s sleep, and (3) falls back to publishing without --provenance after persistent registry 404s. Permanent fix for the 2026-05-27 npm E404 outage that left all 19 packages tagged in git but unpublished on npm.
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: Add bun-install verification to release workflow
metadata.description: Smoke-test that the just-published npm package installs cleanly via bun via daily release workflow.
metadata.author: codex

notes.author: codex
notes.text: 2026-05-29 release-readiness refresh: package manifest/lock now target @unbrained/pm-cli >=2026.5.29 / ^2026.5.29 and pm-changelog ^2026.5.29-2 where applicable. Verified npm run check, npm test, npm run pack:dry-run, npm run audit:prod, npm run changelog:full, npm run changelog:check, npm run release:check, and pm validate. High-confidence worktree/history secret scan recorded no credential-shaped token findings for active package code; nonzero scan rows were classified as placeholders or vendored historical test data where applicable. Logs: /tmp/pm-active-package-gates-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-changelog-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-release-check-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-validate-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-secret-scan-20260529.tsv.
